summary: FQ-09W scene backdrops, underground darkness, and backing-wall foundation: a scenic backdrop plane (world_backdrop.gd, z -10, light_mask 0 - code-drawn sky gradient to the deepest valley line, far/mid silhouette ridges with 2px-stepped parallax, optional art/generated/backgrounds/ hooks), a BackgroundWalls TileMapLayer (z -2) rebuilt each setup from the pristine generated surface + dirt depth (dirt band then stone; zero physics/occlusion layers; never in cells/deltas/saves; art/generated/back_walls/ hooks over darkened-block fallbacks; wall_at() visual-only query), and depth-aware ambient via a live column-skylight model (world.sky_line cached per column, invalidated on block change) driving ambient_target_color() from the day/night/storm base toward CAVE_TINT over a 6-cell band - an open mined shaft re-admits daylight while a sealed column stays dark. Documented approximation: player-column roof-awareness, no lateral bleed (directional-shadow sunlight assessed and recorded as the future path - occluders are tileset-level and only on blocks_light blocks). Torch lights, light_score, shelter, mining, collision, and the save format untouched; old saves load unchanged. Suite 203 -> 210 (7 fq09w_* checks); screenshot tour gains 09_underground_midday_torch; two composition bugs (average-horizon void, torch glow on distant ridges) found by frame review and fixed. Haiku verifier NO FINDINGS.
scope: FQ-09W only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md - no FQ-09A/09M work, no wall placement/removal/drops/wall-deltas (recorded future gameplay task), no save-format change, no FQ-02 background-flora resurrection, repo still ships zero art.
next_action: FQ-09A: future asset manifest and prompt packs (include opening cel frames, background layers, back-wall tiles).
